question_text: From the timeline shown below of the French Revolution, which event came earliest in the sequence?

options.B: Declaration of the Rights of Man

answer_key.explanation: The Bastille was stormed in July 1789 before the Declaration was adopted and before later events.
common_mistakes: Placing the Declaration before the Bastille.

visual.caption: French Revolution event sequence.
visual.altText: A four-event horizontal timeline running from 1789 to 1794 with dated event labels.

events.label: Declaration of the Rights of Man
